description_long: A wooden serving board holds four pieces of sushi, each with a visible layer of salmon on top and a colorful filling of rice, avocado, and possibly other vegetables or seafood. To the left of the sushi is a small white dish filled with dark soy sauce. On the right side of the board stands a large, translucent wine glass with a deep magenta hue, its bowl and stem both clearly visible. The sushi pieces are neatly arranged in a row, with their cross-sections facing outward, showcasing the intricate layers inside. The wooden board has a smooth, striped grain pattern and is elevated slightly by four small feet. The overall presentation is clean and inviting, with a focus on the vibrant colors and textures of the sushi and the elegant glassware.
description: A wooden board displays four pieces of salmon-topped sushi, a small dish of soy sauce, and a magenta wine glass. The arrangement highlights the sushi's colorful fillings and the board's smooth, striped wood grain.
description_view_0: This view shows the sushi pieces, soy sauce dish, and wine glass all clearly arranged on the wooden board, with the sushi cross-sections facing forward.
description_view_1: From this angle, the wine glass is most prominent, partially obscuring the sushi and soy sauce dish behind it.
description_view_2: The sushi pieces are seen from the opposite side, with the wine glass now on the left and the soy sauce dish on the right, all items visible and neatly aligned.
description_view_3: Looking from the end of the board, the sushi pieces are arranged in two rows, with the wine glass and soy sauce dish at the far end.
